channel.title: POCO X7 Pro MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: POCO X7 Pro MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.300.0.WOJTWXM Fastboot update for POCO X7 Pro Taiwan
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: POCO X7 Pro Taiwan

Codename: rodin

Version: OS3.0.300.0.WOJTWXM | 16.0

Size: 7.8 GB

MD5: 5d0527cbb5f02513d9a3200cf3e3b889

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.300.0.WOJIDXM Fastboot update for POCO X7 Pro Indonesia
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: POCO X7 Pro Indonesia

Codename: rodin

Version: OS3.0.300.0.WOJIDXM | 16.0

Size: 9.4 GB

MD5: 23a460da96cebb3967835734eb291d25

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.300.0.WOJTWXM Recovery update for POCO X7 Pro Taiwan
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: POCO X7 Pro Taiwan

Codename: rodin

Version: OS3.0.300.0.WOJTWXM | 16.0

Size: 6.5 GB

MD5: 9a2c723cd64972421e2038441fb3a5c3

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions

Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOJINXM Fastboot update for POCO X7 Pro India
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: POCO X7 Pro India

Codename: rodin

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOJINXM | 16.0

Size: 8.5 GB

MD5: ed3772e8fcc93e412cf4a653dc951a54

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOJINXM Recovery update for POCO X7 Pro India
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: POCO X7 Pro India

Codename: rodin

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOJINXM | 16.0

Size: 6.5 GB

MD5: 0d8d70a3f8bc603e070cc971cfe0b1bb

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time

Optimization: Resource scheduling by delaying background app resource allocation to reduce lag in foreground apps
[Privacy and security]

Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

item.title: MIUI OS2.0.101.0.VOJCNXM Recovery update for Redmi Turbo 4 China
item.description:
New Stable Beta Recovery update available!

Device: Redmi Turbo 4 China

Codename: rodin

Version: OS2.0.101.0.VOJCNXM | 15.0

Size: 7.1 GB

MD5: e8226fb7ab32ce92e1e733a4d0ee9453

Changelog:
[System animations]
New: During the process of opening or closing apps, the full screen indicator follows the window's movement
New: When quickly opening and closing apps, multiple app animations are displayed simultaneously
[System]
New: Support for one-tap clipboard clearing
Optimization: Bluetooth status bar icon
Updated the security patch to January 2025. Increased system security.
[Floating windows]
New: Beautify for video feature entry prompt in the call toolbox
[Home screen]
New: After turning off the Home screen search bar, a 4×6 layout option becomes available
[Control center]
New: Flashlight brightness adjustment page
New: Notification spotlight for flashlight
[Lock screen]
New: Scenery templates
[Gallery]
Optimization: "On this day" feature now supports hiding content
Optimization: Day and month views are available for the start page
Optimization: Search results page can now show the progress of Gallery analysis by AI
Optimization: Search results for identification documents
Optimization: Display layouts for Gallery items
Optimization: Gallery now supports deleting and hiding items via long pressing
Optimization: Search results for time and location keywords
Fix: CAD images were mistakenly placed in Gallery
[Recents]
Fix: Recents couldn't be cleared in some cases
[Xiaomi Hyper XiaoAi]
Your smart personal assistant
· New visuals with multiple ways to activate the assistant anytime you need it.
Multimodal interaction: Perceive the world around you with your camera and easily recognize objects that appear on your screen.
· Improved search: Supports natural language searches for photos, videos, documents, notes, and recordings.
Smart scenes: Seamlessly integrates system features, letting you perform complex tasks with a single step. This feature also learns your patterns to offer helpful services proactively.
[Game speed booster]
New: Game Turbo performance dashboard
Optimization: Game Turbo interface improvements
[Status bar, Notification shade]
Fix: Notifications weren't displayed correctly in some cases

Download: Here

Incremental Update: Here
